Workflow Gate Map

Every gate that can block a workflow, where it fires, and who owns it.

Clinical Review Gate MANDATORY · NO BYPASS

Fires before any generated or adapted recipe can ship, copy, or publish. Owned by Clinical Review Admin + Clinician Reviewers. 47 screens touch this gate.

Hard Rules Enforcement HARD BLOCK

Fires on profile save, recipe generation, planning, grocery, and food logging. Owner sets; platform enforces everywhere. 40 screens.

Permission / Role Gate EVERY REQUEST

Resolve tenant, role, permission, audit, and feature gate before any work executes. Applies to all 403 screens.

Compliance Boundary Gate PHI/PII

Fires when PHI/PII crosses a tenant or external boundary. Critical for Phase 3 regulated tenants (Clinical, Trial, VA, Senior Living, Enterprise).

Publishing Gate PUBLIC SURFACE

Fires before public-website recipes/content go live. Owned by Publishing Admin.

Consent / Attestation Gate PHASE 3 REGULATED

Fires at trial enrollment, data-sharing, claims, and agreements. Owned by Legal / Compliance / PI.

Wireframe Production Queue — P053 screens

Highest-priority screens to wireframe first. Full P0→P3 ranking is in the workbook Wireframe Priority sheet.
